news.title: YouTube’s mobile app finally lets you share timestamped videos
news.summary: YouTube is making some changes that might affect how you share videos from the mobile app. From the app, you can finally share videos from a specific timestamp, which will make it easier to point someone to a part of a video you might want them to see while you're on your phone. news.title: Ballmer gives $80 million to NPR, with strings attached
news.summary: Connie Ballmer, wife of former Microsoft CEO Steve Ballmer and co-founder of the Ballmer Group, has given $80 million to NPR.
